# Proof of Audit

Proof of Audit is a public Verax demo application for creating on-chain attestations of smart contract audits on Linea.

## Primary URL

- [Proof of Audit](https://audit.examples.ver.ax/)

## Purpose

Use the site to connect a wallet and link a GitHub repository URL, audited commit hash, and smart contract address to a Verax attestation.

## Important Resources

- [Verax website](https://www.ver.ax/)
- [Verax documentation](https://docs.ver.ax/)
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/alainncls/proof-of-audit)
